$schema_note: Complete page inventory with routes, access, and content definition

public_pages.content: Portal identity, brief feature overview, login CTA; Guest-visible general info only
Single form — students use university (OSAS) credentials, staff use portal accounts; role auto-detected; friendly errors for inactive/alumni students; lockout notice
Staff local accounts only; students directed to OSAS for credential issues
Token-validated new password form with policy hints

student_pages.content: Weekly timetable grid (OSAS-synced); holiday/suspension/makeup badges from calendar exceptions
Fullscreen camera scanner; instant Present/Late confirmation; specific error states with retry (QR rotates every minute)
Filterable history (term/subject/date/status); per-subject summaries; 'Request correction' action per record with reason + attachment
Request list with Pending/Approved/Rejected status and reviewer notes
Feed with read state; preference toggles per event type
OSAS-synced fields read-only (ID, program, year, section, status, photo); local fields editable (contact); adviser shown; device sessions list with revoke

widgets: Today's classes with Start Session buttons

faculty_pages.content: Assigned offerings for the term: subject, section, schedule, room, enrollment count, attendance rate
Roster, schedule, session history, per-student rates, export actions
Fullscreen dynamic QR (regenerates every 60s), class name, live Present/Late counter; side roster panel; static-QR indicator when enabled; Close Session with absents preview
Filterable grid across own classes; manual entry (technical-issue fallback) and override dialogs (reason required)
Queue with evidence view; approve/reject with note
Session sheets, class summaries, per-student, at-risk; daily/weekly/monthly/semester ranges; CSV/XLSX/PDF export

widgets: KPI tiles: today's rate, active sessions now, total students/faculty

admin_pages.content: Directory with filters (course/year/section/status), OSAS sync indicators, CSV import wizard with row-validation preview, adviser assignment
Profile (OSAS fields read-only), enrollments, full attendance history, corrections, notes
Directory, create with linked account, assignment overview (classes/sections/rooms)
CRUD: code, title, units, type, semester
Subject+section+faculty+term assembly; per-offering grace/cutoff overrides; schedule editor with conflict detection
Bulk enroll by section or list; drop with history preserved
Calendar exceptions: holidays, suspensions, makeup classes, special events; OSAS sync + manual entries; shows affected sessions
Live view of all open sessions (rooms, counts, percentages); drill into any session; department-wide day view
Department-wide queue with SLA aging indicators

super_admin_pages.content: All accounts, roles, activation, forced resets, device sessions
Year/semester CRUD, current-term switch, term dates
Attendance thresholds, QR rotation interval, static-QR allowance, OSAS config + manual sync triggers, email templates, module feature flags, maintenance banner, timezone/date formats
Filterable log explorer (actor/entity/action/date) with before/after diff view

shared_ux_rules: Every list page: search + filters + server pagination + empty/loading/error states
Every destructive action: ConfirmDialog stating consequences
Every mutation: toast on success/failure; forms preserve input on error
Breadcrumbs on all nested pages; document titles per page
